full_text:
Gao Zhen 高朕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Zhen (高朕)was born in Chenliu?. Arranged the reconstruction of a ceremonial hall in honour of the sage Duke of Zhou. Gao Zhen was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
